title: helm: Fix file descriptor leak in createFullPath
author: YadavAkhileshh

findings.description: os.IsExist(err) branch is dead code: OpenFile with O_CREATE|O_WRONLY (no O_EXCL) never returns EEXIST
Commit subject missing SubArea; should be 'helm: repository: Fix file descriptor leak in createFullPath'
createFullPath now returns error and closes the file internally, eliminating the caller-side leak
Test step 2 (remove file after create) verifies no leaked descriptor — important on Windows
